name: novel-reader-platform
description: منصة قراءة الروايات الإلكترونية متعددة اللغات

scripts.build: npm run server:build && npm run client:build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules server/node_modules client/node_modules server/dist client/dist
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run seed

author: Novel Reader Platform
